creator: Reicha7
description: Based on similar Blueprint for Have I Got News for You this Divider Blueprint splits up the episode title to form a list of the guest stars.
Recommended that you edit the titles to just be comma separated or import from your Plex library as some seasons on the TVDb are not formatted correctly for this.
Episode title example: Milton Jones, Lou Sanders, Angela Barnes, Ed Byrne, Ahir Shah.
